SELECT materialize('foo') AS foo_constant, count(*) FROM test_materialize WHERE value = materialize('test_value');
SELECT materialize(x) FROM (SELECT materialize('inner_constant') AS x);
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, reference String);
SELECT t1.id, countMatches(t1.reference, materialize('ref_value')) FROM test_join t1 JOIN test_materialize t2 ON t1.id = 1 GROUP BY t1.id;
SELECT materialize('join_constant') AS join_const, t1.id FROM test_join t1 WHERE t1.reference = materialize('ref_value');
SELECT materialize(x + y) FROM (SELECT materialize(3) AS x, materialize(4) AS y);
SELECT materialize('foo') AS single_value FROM test_materialize WHERE materialize('foo') = 'foo';
SELECT materialize(x) FROM (SELECT materialize('outer_constant') AS x) WHERE materialize('inner_constant') = 'inner_constant';
SELECT count(*), materialize('test_count') FROM test_materialize GROUP BY materialize('test_count');
SELECT DISTINCT materialize('unique_constant') AS unique_col FROM test_materialize;
SELECT materialize('concat_value') || ' appended' AS concatenated FROM test_materialize;
